AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY WASHINGTON, DERRICK AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, JIE FENG  (DRIVER) GUO, CATHERINE  (OWNER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-07-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
